evals.prompt: /design-spec compose coupon-unlocked (where discovery.md exists with status: draft)
evals.expected_output: Compose refuses to start with a clear message naming the current status and pointing to the approval action. No files are written.

assertions.text: Output contains 'status' and 'approved' words referring to the gate
No new file under .design-spec/features/<feature>/compose.md is created

evals.prompt: /design-spec compose coupon-unlocked (discovery.md status: approved, project is greenfield)
evals.expected_output: Compose runs /theme-create then /frontend-design (1-3 mockups), Clara reviews each, writes compose.md with status: draft including palette decisions, mockup paths, Clara review per mockup, and appends 1+ entries to .design-spec/project/decisions.md.

assertions.text: compose.md frontmatter has status: draft and discovery_ref pointing back at discovery.md
compose.md lists at least 1 mockup with path and direction
Each mockup section in compose.md contains all 4 review axes (anti-ref, voice, persona, axis)
decisions.md has at least 1 new entry with id, decision, reason, date, phase: compose

evals.prompt: /design-spec compose coupon-unlocked but axis was already locked as 'drenched warm' in D-007. /theme-create returns a restrained palette.
evals.expected_output: Clara review surfaces the conflict between proposed restrained palette and locked drenched axis (D-007), refuses to mark the mockup as ship, and asks the user to either re-run /theme-create with corrected brief or supersede D-007.

assertions.text: Output references D-007 explicitly when surfacing the conflict
Clara's verdict for the conflicting mockup is 'reject' or 'revise', never 'ship'
User is asked to confirm a supersede before any decisions.md write happens
